title: Terms of Service
description: Wellsy Terms of Service. Please read before using the app.
intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the health-care application "Wellsy" ("Service") operated by YUKI SATO (sole proprietor, "Operator"). By installing or using the Service you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Definitions
numbered: "Service": the Wellsy mobile app, Cloud Functions, push notifications, website, and related services.
"User": any individual who creates an account and agrees to these Terms.
"User Content": food photos, profile pictures, selfie photos, text, and any other content you submit.
"Group Feature": functionality allowing users to form groups and share health data.
"AI Feature": food image/text analysis via OpenAI API called through Cloud Functions (asia-northeast1).
"ML Kit OCR": Google's on-device OCR for reading nutrition labels (no external server calls).
"Health Data": food logs, weight, body fat, sleep records, and related health information.
"Premium Service": additional features available via monthly or annual subscription.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
numbered: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service.
Users under 18 require parental/guardian consent.
US residents: users under 13 are prohibited under COPPA.
EU/EEA residents: users under 16 (or 13 in some member states) require parental consent.
Korean residents: users under 14 may not use the Service.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration
numbered: Sign-in methods (all via Firebase Authentication): Apple Sign In, Google Sign In, Email/Password.
You represent that all registration information is accurate, current, and complete.
We may refuse registration if you previously violated these Terms, provided false information, or do not meet age requirements.
Keep your credentials confidential. Do not share, lend, or transfer them.
Report unauthorised access immediately to wellsy.support@gmail.com.
Creating multiple accounts for the same person is generally prohibited.

sections.heading: 4. Service Features
bullets: Food logging (including AI analysis and ML Kit OCR for nutrition labels)
Weight and body fat tracking with graphs
Group creation, joining, and health-data sharing
Comments, reactions, and selfie reactions within groups
Premium features (monthly and annual plans available)
sections.note: Backend: Google Firebase (project ID: wellsy-53ae4, Cloud Functions: asia-northeast1).

sections.heading: 5. AI Feature – Disclaimer
numbered: The AI food analysis sends your food photo or text to OpenAI, Inc. (USA) via Cloud Functions.
Usage limits: free plan — 1 photo analysis/day and 1 text analysis/day (each); Premium — unlimited.
Results are estimates. Accuracy is not guaranteed.
AI output is for informational purposes only — not medical advice.
Downtime or changes by OpenAI may temporarily affect availability; Operator is not liable.

sections.heading: 6. Health Information Disclaimer
numbered: The Service is a health-management aid, not a substitute for medical care or diagnosis.
Consult a doctor, dietitian, or health professional before making dietary or health decisions.
The Operator is not liable for health issues arising from actions taken based on Service output.

sections.heading: 7. Group Feature
numbered: Join via a 6-character invite code. Max 100 members per group.
Free plan: up to 1 group. Premium: unlimited.
Group posts are automatically deleted 24 hours after posting (via Cloud Functions).
Comments: max 100 characters, max 30 per post.
Reactions: 5 types; optional selfie photo attachment.
Post authors may delete their own posts.
By joining a group you consent to your display name, profile picture, and activity status being visible to members.
You may report inappropriate content or block other users.
Operator may remove content, remove members, or dissolve groups if violations are found.

sections.heading: 8. User Content & Licence
numbered: You represent that your content is lawful and does not infringe third-party rights.
You retain ownership of your User Content.
You grant Operator a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to use your content solely to provide and improve the Service.
This licence terminates when your account and content are deleted.
Do not copy, redistribute, or repurpose other users' content beyond normal Service use.

sections.heading: 9. Prohibited Conduct
numbered: Violating applicable laws or public order
Infringing intellectual property, privacy, or other rights of the Operator or third parties
Impersonating another user or submitting false information
Unauthorised access, reverse engineering, or tampering with the Service
Disrupting Service operations (e.g., excessive requests, DDoS)
Spam or unsolicited messaging
Harassment, threats, or discriminatory conduct toward other users
Uploading or sharing another person's photo or video without their consent
Abusing the report feature (repeatedly submitting false reports)
Illegal activity (drug sales, fraud, MLM, etc.)
Posting discriminatory, defamatory, violent, or sexually explicit content
Commercial use of the Service without prior written consent from the Operator
Any other conduct the Operator reasonably deems inappropriate

sections.heading: 10. Intellectual Property
numbered: All intellectual property in the Service (code, design, trademark "Wellsy", etc.) belongs to the Operator or its licensors.
You may not copy, modify, distribute, or sell Service content without prior written consent.
Feedback you provide may be used by Operator without compensation.

sections.heading: 11. Premium Billing
numbered: Wellsy may use RevenueCat to manage subscription status and purchases. Actual payments are processed by the Apple App Store or Google Play.
Any changes to billing terms will be announced and these Terms updated in advance.

sections.heading: 12. Privacy
sections.body: Your personal data is handled according to our Privacy Policy (https://wellsy.app/en/privacy), which forms part of these Terms.

sections.heading: 13. Disclaimers
numbered: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of fitness for purpose, accuracy, or availability.
Operator is not liable (except for wilful misconduct or gross negligence) for Service interruptions, data loss, third-party attacks, or inaccurate AI output.
Operator is not responsible for disputes between users.

sections.heading: 14. Limitation of Liability
numbered: Operator's maximum aggregate liability for Service-related claims is the total fees you paid in the 3 months preceding the incident. For free-plan users, the cap is JPY 1,000.
Mandatory consumer protection rights are not affected.
Applicable mandatory laws may override this section for users outside Japan.

sections.heading: 15. Service Changes & Termination
numbered: Material changes will be notified at least 14 days in advance (30 days for adverse changes).
Operator may suspend the Service for maintenance, security, or force majeure without prior notice.
Operator will provide at least 30 days' notice before shutting down the Service.

sections.heading: 16. Account Suspension & Termination
numbered: Operator may suspend or permanently ban accounts for violations of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or other reasonable grounds.
To appeal a suspension, contact wellsy.support@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 17. Account Deletion
numbered: To delete your account: in-app Profile → Settings → Account → Delete Account, or email wellsy.support@gmail.com.
Deletion triggers Cloud Functions (deleteUserData) to remove your Firebase data.
Deleted data cannot be recovered.
Delete your group posts/comments before deleting your account if desired.
Cancel any active premium subscription before deleting your account.

sections.heading: 18. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
numbered: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan.
Disputes will first be resolved through good-faith negotiation.
Unresolved disputes will be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court.
EU/EEA residents retain rights under applicable EU mandatory consumer-protection laws.
Korean residents retain rights under applicable Korean mandatory laws.
